---
title: "[TODO] Understanding Reinforcement Learning"
description: "Will write about reinforcement learning methods in control"
author: "evannsmc"
date: "2025-1-1"
categories: [dynamical systems, control theory, reinforcement learning]
# image: "thumbnail.jpg"
draft: false
bibliography: references.bib
csl: ../../../ieee.csl
---

## Introduction

Will fill in here when I have time :)
